description.overview: The English Setter is an elegant bird dog known for its gentle temperament and beautiful speckled coat.
description.temperament: English Setters are gentle, friendly, and wonderful with children. They're people-oriented and aim to please.
description.health: Prone to hip dysplasia, deafness, and thyroid issues.
description.exercise: High energy dogs needing regular exercise. Love running and outdoor activities.

verdict.summary: Gentle, elegant bird dogs with beautiful coats. English Setters are wonderful family companions who need regular exercise and human companionship.
